title: glochidion eriocarpum
intro: Glochidion eriocarpum, a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, is commonly known as the "yellow staminate." This plant is native to tropical Asia and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glochidion eriocarpum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
